info.title: Change file mode in global configuration to GroupExecute, GroupRead, UserExecute, UserWrite, UserRead
info.description:
A simple cross platform ACME client (WACS)
Software version 2.3.5.2195 (release, pluggable, dotnet, 64-bit)
Connecting to https://acme-v02.api.letsencrypt.org/...
Running as limited user, some options *including autorenewal* disabled
Cronjob not configured yet
Please leave a ★ at https://github.com/simple-acme/simple-acme
